plugins.name: Qwen3 ASR
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by MLX on Apple Silicon. 30 languages, no API key required.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit MLX auf Apple Silicon. 30 Sprachen, kein API-Key noetig.

plugins.name: Linear
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Create Linear issues from transcribed or processed text. Requires a Linear API key.

descriptions.de: Linear-Issues aus transkribiertem oder verarbeitetem Text erstellen. Erfordert einen Linear-API-Key.

plugins.name: Webhook Notifications
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Send transcribed or processed text to any webhook URL via HTTP POST.

descriptions.de: Transkribierten oder verarbeiteten Text per HTTP POST an eine beliebige Webhook-URL senden.

plugins.name: Groq
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription and LLM via Groq API. Fast inference, requires API key.

descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription und LLM ueber die Groq-API. Schnelle Inferenz, erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription plus OpenAI/ChatGPT prompts. Use an API key or ChatGPT login.

descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription plus OpenAI-/ChatGPT-Prompts. Nutzbar per API-Key oder ChatGPT-Login.

plugins.name: Gemini
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via Google Gemini API. Requires API key.

descriptions.de: LLM-Anbieter ueber die Google Gemini API. Erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: WhisperKit
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by WhisperKit. 7 model sizes, 99 languages, streaming support.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit WhisperKit. 7 Modellgroessen, 99 Sprachen, Streaming-Unterstuetzung.

plugins.name: Parakeet
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by NVIDIA Parakeet TDT. Fast and accurate, 25 languages.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit NVIDIA Parakeet TDT. Schnell und praezise, 25 Sprachen.

plugins.name: OpenAI Compatible
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API server for transcription and LLM. Works with Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, and more.

descriptions.de: Verbindung zu jedem OpenAI-kompatiblen API-Server fuer Transkription und LLM. Funktioniert mit Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM und mehr.

plugins.name: Apple Speech
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: On-device speech recognition using Apple's Speech framework. Requires macOS 26+, streaming support.

descriptions.de: Geraetebasierte Spracherkennung mit Apples Speech-Framework. Erfordert macOS 26+, Streaming-Unterstuetzung.

plugins.name: Obsidian
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Save transcriptions to your Obsidian vault as Markdown notes. Supports daily notes, frontmatter, and auto-export.

descriptions.de: Transkriptionen als Markdown-Notizen in deinem Obsidian-Vault speichern. Unterstuetzt Tagesnotizen, Frontmatter und Auto-Export.

plugins.name: Script Runner
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Post-process transcribed text through custom shell scripts. Pass text via stdin, get results via stdout.

descriptions.de: Transkribierten Text durch eigene Shell-Skripte nachbearbeiten. Text wird per stdin uebergeben, Ergebnis per stdout zurueckgegeben.

plugins.name: Granite 3.3 Speech
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by IBM Granite 3.3 8B via MLX on Apple Silicon. No API key required.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit IBM Granite 3.3 8B via MLX auf Apple Silicon. Kein API-Key erforderlich.

plugins.name: Voxtral
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by Voxtral Mini via MLX on Apple Silicon. No API key required.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit Voxtral Mini via MLX auf Apple Silicon. Kein API-Key erforderlich.

plugins.name: Fireworks AI
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription and LLM via Fireworks AI. Streaming transcription, fast inference, requires API key.

descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription und LLM ueber Fireworks AI. Streaming-Transkription, schnelle Inferenz, erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: OpenRouter
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Access 300+ LLMs from OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, Google and more via OpenRouter. Shows model pricing and account balance. Requires API key.

descriptions.de: Zugriff auf ueber 300 LLMs von OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, Google und mehr ueber OpenRouter. Zeigt Modellpreise und Kontoguthaben. Erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: Cerebras
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Ultra-fast LLM inference via Cerebras API. Up to 3,000 tokens/sec. Requires API key.

descriptions.de: Ultra-schnelle LLM-Inferenz ueber die Cerebras-API. Bis zu 3.000 Tokens/Sek. Erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: Claude
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via Anthropic Claude API. Requires API key.

descriptions.de: LLM-Anbieter ueber die Anthropic Claude API. Erfordert API-Key.

plugins.name: Gemma 4
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local LLM powered by Google Gemma 4 on Apple Silicon via MLX. No API key required.

descriptions.de: Lokales LLM mit Google Gemma 4 auf Apple Silicon via MLX. Kein API-Key erforderlich.
